name: APEX Development Radial Module Architect Console
truth_boundary: This configuration drives a symbolic human-control interface. It does not represent biometric sensing, consciousness measurement, live module execution, or permission for scaled automation.

center_core.label: APEX DEVELOPMENT / HUMAN CONTROL CORE
center_core.purpose: Coordinate, inspect, approve, redirect, hold, stop and evolve APEX module development.

module_pods.label: APEX Perfect Analysis
module_pods.purpose: Determine truth, gaps, options and intended benefit.

module_pods.label: APEX PhD Research
module_pods.purpose: Establish sourced evidence and verified knowledge.

module_pods.label: APEX Learning Center
module_pods.purpose: Run learning and Human/AI proof pathways.

module_pods.label: APEX Analytics Mirror Module
module_pods.purpose: Deliver the business-facing analytics and governance experience.

module_pods.label: APEX Test Workbench
module_pods.purpose: Validate, stress-test, repair and control promotion.

module_pods.label: APEX Dimensions & Fields
module_pods.purpose: Map layers, relationships, unknowns and model quality.

view_modes.label: Architecture
view_modes.effect: Show radial module constellation, relationship lines and repository badges.

view_modes.label: Features
view_modes.effect: Expand pods into P0/P1 feature cards and progress states.

view_modes.label: Dimensions
view_modes.effect: Overlay 0D-to-17D coverage for the selected module and expose gaps.

view_modes.label: Evidence
view_modes.effect: Emphasize supported tests, receipts and blockers; fade unsupported claims.

view_modes.label: Roadmap
view_modes.effect: Arrange modules along current-state to proof-bearing direction path.

view_modes.label: Vertical Slice
view_modes.effect: Focus on input, process, output, evidence, decision and scale gate.

scale_gates.condition: Bounded end-to-end vertical slice is selected and defined.
Runnable artifact or output has been produced.
Functional tests have been performed and recorded.
Benefit, risk and repeatability have been reviewed.
Evidence receipt and repository route are present.
Operator approval for any scale review is recorded.

flow: Select APEX Analytics Mirror module pod
View current truth status and missing proof
Select STAY, SWITCH, HOLD, STOP or INNOVATE
acceptance_tests: VS-T001: Radial canvas renders center core and six correct module pods.
VS-T002: Analytics Mirror pod opens correct inspector content.
VS-T003: Truth status and one missing-proof statement are visible.
VS-T004: Direction decision can be selected and changed prior to export.
VS-T005: Task packet includes module, direction, scope, close gate and evidence route.
VS-T006: Evidence candidate uses bounded status rather than unsupported claims.
VS-T008: Primary flow supports keyboard navigation.

final_direction_stack.direction: Build VS-DEV-CONSOLE-001 as a local interactive radial-console prototype focused on Analytics Mirror.
Render the radial UI from this normalized configuration contract rather than hard-coded visual content.
final_direction_stack.gate: Configuration fields validate and render correctly.

final_direction_stack.direction: Generate Evidence Ledger receipt and preserve visible APEX 1M lock state.
final_direction_stack.gate: No unsupported promotion or scale state appears.

final_direction_stack.direction: Sandbox animated ring illumination as modules earn evidence.
final_direction_stack.gate: Usability and truth-display review only; no automated execution.

next_smallest_human_control_improvement: Build only the one-pod vertical slice with explicit evidence and scale-lock visibility before expanding the radial console.
